description: In the incident response runbook, move the complete subsection titled '### Isolate Affected Systems' from under '## Initial Triage' to under '## Containment', placing it immediately after the Containment intro paragraph and before '### Limit Spread'. Preserve the moved subsection exactly, including its bullet list and blockquote. Leave the similarly named '### Isolate Affected Systems Checklist' subsection and the fenced-code mention of '### Isolate Affected Systems' untouched.
